sentences.text: what can i be written by karen mokler illustrated by kathy reene focus question who is telling this story

halloween is coming soon what can i be what can be i can be a pale ghost i can be a shiny robot i can be an old mummy i can be a big box i can be a cute carrot i can be a sweet child maybe you can be me connections writing and art what else could the monster dress up as for halloween
i can be a pale ghost
i can be a shiny robot
i can be an old mummy
i can be a big box
i can be a cute carrot
i can be a sweet child
connections writing and art what else could the monster dress up as for halloween draw a picture and label it social studies what are some halloween traditions share your ideas with a partner
